captures.title: Executive Dashboard
captures.description: Board-level workforce KPIs, key insights, risk distribution, department hot spots, and department risk profile.

captures.title: Turnover Analytics
captures.description: Detailed high-risk employee view with intervention KPIs, risk probability distribution, recommended actions, and employee table.

captures.title: Tenure Analytics
captures.description: Tenure versus flight-risk analytics with average tenure, median tenure, and early-tenure employee KPIs.

captures.title: Salary Analytics
captures.description: Compensation distribution by department and risk level with average, median, and range KPIs.

captures.title: Department Comparison
captures.description: Side-by-side department-level employee count, risk probability, salary, and tenure comparison table.

captures.title: AI Assistant
captures.description: Natural-language workforce data query assistant with example questions and SQL execution workflow.
